clip.page.title: Clipboard Sync
clip.page.subtitle: Discover devices on your LAN that also run OwO! WinDeploy, pair with a PIN, and share clipboard contents (text + images) — preview, sync and manage them together.
clip.status.label: Sharing:
clip.peers.none: No other device running OwO! WinDeploy found yet. Make sure sharing is started on both and they are on the same network.
clip.peers.noActive: No paired device yet. Invite one from the list on the left.
clip.peers.invitePinLabel: Tell the other device this PIN and have them enter it:
clip.peers.inviteWaiting: Waiting for “{0}” to enter the PIN…
clip.peers.startFirst: Start sharing first, then invite a device.
clip.peers.atCapacity: Device limit reached. The open-source build shares between 2 devices; the paid build lifts this via a relay server.
clip.peers.manualHint: Can't find the other device? Enter the LAN IP shown on its “This device” line to pair manually:
clip.peers.manualBadIp: Enter a valid IPv4 address (the peer's “This device” IP).
clip.board.addPlaceholder: Add text to the shared clipboard…
clip.board.clearConfirm: Clear the shared clipboard on this device? This only clears your local view; it does not delete entries on paired devices.
clip.board.empty: No entries yet. Copy something on any paired device, or add text above.
clip.board.previewHint: Select an entry to preview it here.
clip.settings.autoApply: Auto-apply incoming entries to this PC's clipboard
clip.settings.autoApplyHint: On: a copy on any paired device is immediately paste-able here (overwrites your current clipboard). Off: incoming entries only appear in the shared list for preview / manual copy.
clip.settings.persist: Keep history on disk across restarts
clip.settings.persistHint: On: the shared list is saved under %LOCALAPPDATA% and survives a restart (clipboard content is written to disk). Off: the list lives only in memory and clears on exit (safer for sensitive content).
clip.settings.capInfo: Open-source build: up to {0} devices per share. The paid build will route through a relay server to lift this and work beyond the LAN.
clip.settings.savedRestart: Settings saved. The port change takes effect after you stop and start sharing again.
clip.settings.invalidPort: Ports must be numbers between 1 and 65535.
clip.settings.portsClash: The pairing port and discovery port must differ.
clip.pin.title: Join clipboard share
clip.pin.prompt: “{0}” invited this device to share its clipboard. Enter the PIN shown on that device:
clip.pin.hint: 6 digits. Sharing only starts if the PIN matches.
